classObjective: Write and solve systems of equations to model real-world situations and use graphing to solve linear equations and systems with decimal coefficients.
workedExamples: 7-1, Example 4 — Write and Solve a System from a Word Problem
7-1, Example 5 — Solve a Linear Equation by Graphing a System
7-1, Example 6 — Solve Decimal Systems by Graphing
7-1, Example 7 — More Word Problems with Systems
warmUp: Write a system for: Two numbers add to 30, their difference is 6
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: aviation and elevator motion problems; decimal coefficient handling; interpreting intersection points as solutions
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice writing systems from real-world contexts and solving including decimal coefficient cases
independentPractice: Practice problems writing and solving systems for real-world situations including decimal coefficients
assessment: Exit ticket: write and solve a system for a problem involving ticket sales with two types of tickets
capReflection: How does graphing a system of equations help you visualize the solution to a real-world problem?
